title: Prehealth Experience
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Prehealth Experience
In addition to excelling in the pre-requisite coursework and entrance exam, schools of the health professions expect prospective applicants to have developed a rich portfolio of experiences that have informed their understanding of health care, challenged their intellect, and demonstrated their commitment to others. Prospective applicants are strongly recommended to get involved in clinical experience, research experience, civic engagement, student clubs and organization.
Not sure how and where to gain experience:
Contact shanghai.involvement@nyu.edu to check out student clubs & organizations.
Apply for a student leadership position in the student government.
Learn more about the NYU Abu Dhabi MCAT Preparation and Pre-health Seminar.
Learn more about community service and learning opportunities through Office of Community Engagement Learning.
Get involved in multicultural programs with NYU Shanghai Diversity Initiatives.
Stay tuned for upcoming events hosted by the NYU Shanghai Medical Minds Student Club.
Reference: NYU College of Arts and Science Prehealth
